title: Master v0.5.0 Broken Feedback Recovery Fix
notes:
Allows Master to recover and move broken/empty feedback files instead of every feedback action failing.

Changes:
- Master can now mark broken feedback files.
- If a feedback JSON cannot be parsed, Master creates a recovery JSON.
- Recovery JSON stores original path, original length, and preview if available.
- Mark Seen / Need More Info / Mark Fixed / Reject now work on broken feedback.
- Broken reports can be moved out of the New queue into fixed/rejected/etc.
- Keeps Feedback Queue UI fix from v0.4.9.
